angel_desc: A biblically accurate angel. Protects allies and attacks with holy light.
angel_divine_word_desc: The angel speaks a divine word, protecting the chosen area. Grants $n_block$ shield for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns} in radius $radius$ at range $range$. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
angel_divine_word_tooltip: Grants a shield to targets in the area.
angel_scorching_ray_desc: The angel fires a scorching ray that leaves a holy burn. Burns up to {$chain_targets$;target;targets;targets} for $burning_damage$ damage over {$burning_duration$;turn;turns;turns} at range $range$. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
angel_sharp_feathers_desc: The angel rains sharp feathers over the chosen area. Deals $damage$ damage in radius $radius$ at range $range$. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
ball_throw_desc: The bear throws a ball at an enemy, knocking them off balance.
ball_throw_tooltip: Deals $damage$ ranged damage and stuns the target for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}.
bear_ball_throw_desc: The bear throws a ball at an enemy, knocking them off balance. Deals $damage$ damage at range $range$ and stuns for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
bear_ball_throw_tooltip: Deals $damage$ ranged damage and stuns the target for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}.
bear_desc: A sturdy forest bear. Throws a ball from range, heals itself, and powers up.
bear_hallo_desc: The bear says its signature “Hai!” and gets fired up. Gains $n_attack_buff$ Strength for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns} and fears nearby enemies for {$feared_duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
bear_hallo_tooltip: Strength $n_attack_buff$ for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns} and Fear for {$feared_duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
bear_paw_suck_desc: The bear sucks its paw and quickly recovers health. Heals self for $heal$. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
bee_desc: A fast and fragile bee. Stings, heals allies, and can summon another bee.
bee_honey_cold_desc: The bee gives the target sweet honey with a chilly side effect. Heals $heal$ at range $range$ and slows for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
bee_honey_cold_tooltip: Heals the target for $heal$ and slows it for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}.
bee_sting_desc: The bee stings an enemy and leaves poison behind. Deals $damage$ damage to an adjacent target and poisons for $poisoned_damage_pct$% max HP over {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
bee_sting_tooltip: Deals $damage$ damage to an adjacent target and poisons it.
bee_summon_bee_desc: The bee calls another bee for help. Summons a bee on a hex within range $range$. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
bee_summon_bee_tooltip: Summons a bee on the chosen hex.
berry_throw_desc: The bush throws a heavy berry at an enemy.
berry_throw_tooltip: Deals $damage$ damage to one target at range $range$.
boss_victory_heroine_final_ascended_text: I didn't defeat you. I finally stopped arguing with my own shadow.
If everything in me kept changing, then everything in me was alive. That is enough.
Let the office stay an office. I no longer have to be its ceiling.
boss_victory_heroine_final_burnout_text_: I won? Great. Can I now not listen to anyone for at least five minutes?
If this was a resilience exercise, I give it zero and fire the coach.
Remove the final boss, the metaphor, and every incoming message. Especially the incoming messages.
boss_victory_heroine_final_chimera_text_: I... think I won. Or I just became the thing that wins?
Can I not draw a conclusion right now? All my versions are talking at once.
If this is the ending, why do I still feel like a draft?
boss_victory_heroine_final_text_01: If personality is the Ship of Theseus, I hope my coffee mug is still original...
boss_victory_heroine_final_text_02: If I wake up and it's Monday, I'll become the final boss myself.
boss_victory_heroine_final_text_03: Get out of my office, unresolved metaphor!
boss_victory_heroine_final_text_04: Touch grass, look at clouds, and not burn out in the office. I'm sure Ovid would be proud of us...
boss_victory_heroine_final_tranquility_t: I don't want victory. I want silence, moss under my palms, and no one calling me urgent.
Let everything that burned become ash. Sometimes grass grows in ash too.
I'm not going up or down. I'm going where I don't have to answer right away.
burning_bear_burning_claw_desc: The burning bear strikes an enemy with a flaming claw. Deals $damage$ melee damage and burns for $burning_damage$ damage over {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
burning_bear_burning_claw_tooltip: Deals $damage$ damage to an adjacent target and burns it.
burning_bear_desc: Boss. A burning bear with powerful attacks, summons, and a fiery quake.
burning_bear_hellshake_desc: The burning bear shakes the ground with hellish heat. Deals $damage$ damage in radius $radius$ and burns for $burning_damage$ damage over {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
burning_bear_hellshake_tooltip: Deals $damage$ damage around itself and burns enemies.
burning_bear_summon_bear_desc: The burning bear calls a regular bear for help. Summons a bear on a hex within range $range$. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
burning_bear_summon_bear_tooltip: Summons a bear on the chosen hex.
burning_bear_tire_throw_desc: The burning bear hurls a burning tire at an enemy. Deals $damage$ damage at range $range$ and burns for $burning_damage$ damage over {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
burning_bear_tire_throw_tooltip: Deals $damage$ ranged damage and burns the target.
bush_berry_throw_desc: The bush throws a heavy berry at an enemy. Deals $damage$ damage to one target at range $range$. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
bush_berry_throw_tooltip: Deals $damage$ damage to one target at range $range$.
bush_curse_desc: The bush curses an enemy and makes it harder for them to move. Slows one target at range $range$ for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
bush_desc: A living bush. Stands still, throws berries, and pulls enemies in with a pleasant smell.
bush_nice_smell_desc: The bush releases a pleasant smell, pulling enemies closer. Pulls and slows enemies in radius $radius$ for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
bush_nice_smell_tooltip: Pulls enemies in a large area around self.
common_defeat_normal_none_01_ascended: The body is tired, but the light inside it has not gone out.
common_defeat_normal_none_01_burnout: That's it. Even death wants a report by morning.
common_defeat_normal_none_01_chimera: Did I fall? Or did I just reassemble myself badly?
common_defeat_normal_none_01_tranquility: The ground is soft. I don't have to get up yet.
common_defeat_normal_none_02_ascended: Rest is also a way to continue.
common_defeat_normal_none_02_burnout: Restart. Cute. Has anyone tried restarting management?
common_defeat_normal_none_02_chimera: Start over... which part of me, exactly?
common_defeat_normal_none_02_tranquility: First, a breath. Then, perhaps, everything else.
common_defeat_normal_none_03: There must be some way out of here... said the joker to the thief?
common_defeat_normal_none_03_ascended: Even defeat is a door. This one just opened into your face.
common_defeat_normal_none_03_burnout: I didn't break. I finally stopped being operational.
common_defeat_normal_none_03_chimera: I'm not sure this was a mistake. But it looks convincing.
common_defeat_normal_none_03_tranquility: The forest isn't laughing. It is waiting for you to stop making noise.
common_defeat_normal_none_04: You're just a body that stupidly hurts.
common_defeat_normal_none_04_ascended: What you feared arrived. And still became part of you.
common_defeat_normal_none_04_burnout: Great. Now my fear needs approval too.
common_defeat_normal_none_04_chimera: Was I afraid of this? Strange. It looks smaller from the outside.
common_defeat_normal_none_04_tranquility: Dust to dust. Seed to soil. Silence to silence.
common_defeat_normal_none_05: The very thing you're so afraid of will happen to you. Dust you are, and to dust you shall return.
common_defeat_normal_none_05_ascended: Death is not the end, only a change of light.
common_defeat_normal_none_05_burnout: Death is when even notifications finally shut up. Suspiciously appealing.
common_defeat_normal_none_05_chimera: I think I died. Awkward. Was I supposed to choose a pose first?
common_defeat_normal_none_05_tranquility: And it became quiet again. Too quiet to argue.
common_defeat_normal_none_06: Death is what happens to other people... and now to you too.
common_defeat_normal_none_06_ascended: Beyond this is the great unknown. It doesn't have to be frightening.
common_defeat_normal_none_06_burnout: The next great adventure? No thanks, I haven't closed the previous one.
common_defeat_normal_none_06_chimera: The next adventure... or the next version of me. I can't tell the difference yet.
common_defeat_normal_none_06_tranquility: Let the road continue without noise.
common_defeat_normal_none_07: Death is the next great adventure, huh?
common_defeat_normal_none_07_ascended: If loot dropped, let it be mercy.
common_defeat_normal_none_07_burnout: Did I drop loot? I hope it's paid leave.
common_defeat_normal_none_07_chimera: Did something fall out of me? Oh. Was it important?
common_defeat_normal_none_07_tranquility: Nothing dropped from me. I'm taking everything into the woods.
common_defeat_normal_none_08_ascended: The thread broke, but the light still remembers the pattern.
common_defeat_normal_none_08_burnout: The thread of fate is severed. Great. Fewer tasks on the calendar.
common_defeat_normal_none_08_chimera: The thread broke... or was it the wrong thread? I have too many.
common_defeat_normal_none_08_tranquility: If the thread broke, don't pull it. Let it rest on the ground.
common_defeat_normal_none_09: With this character's death, the thread of your fate is severed.
common_defeat_normal_none_09_ascended: We passed. Not through them — through ourselves.
common_defeat_normal_none_09_burnout: Victory? Fine. Just don't schedule a team retrospective.
common_defeat_normal_none_09_chimera: Did we win? I want to say yes, with footnotes.
common_defeat_normal_none_09_tranquility: They are gone. You can hear the leaves returning to their places.
common_wave_victory_none_01: So, do we win like this?
common_wave_victory_none_01_burnout: I found the meta. It's called: 'stop touching me.'
common_wave_victory_none_01_chimera: The meta is clear. The morphosis... is loading.
common_wave_victory_none_01_tranquility: No need to win loudly. It is enough that breathing got easier.
common_wave_victory_none_02: I think I know what the meta is now. All that's left is the morphosis.
common_wave_victory_none_02_ascended: No anger. No hurry. Just another circle turning lighter.
common_wave_victory_none_02_burnout: No nonsense today. I said today. Not tomorrow.
common_wave_victory_none_02_chimera: No chaos today. Well... almost. I tried.
common_wave_victory_none_02_tranquility: No noise today. Let that be the victory.
common_wave_victory_none_03_ascended: To return to the beginning is to finally see it from above.
common_wave_victory_none_03_burnout: Amazing. Even my nightmare uses recurring tasks.
common_wave_victory_none_03_chimera: What if I picked the wrong way last time?
common_wave_victory_none_03_tranquility: I'm like on the path to a home not yet built...
curse_desc: The bush curses an enemy and makes it harder for them to move.
default_heal_desc: Drink coffee to recover and feel more energized. Heals self for $heal$. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
default_heal_tooltip: Heals self for $heal$ and briefly increases attack.
default_melee_desc: A simple punch against a nearby enemy. Deals $damage$ damage to an adjacent target. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
default_melee_tooltip: Deals $damage$ damage to an adjacent target.
default_ranged_desc: Throw coffee at a target, splashing nearby enemies. Deals $damage$ damage at range $range$. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
default_ranged_tooltip: Deals $damage$ damage in radius $radius$ and weakens enemies.
dialogues_boss_defeat_gloat_text: Don't be upset. Losing is a skill too. You're clearly practicing it.
dialogues_boss_intro_early_text: Fast. Or I was standing too close.
dialogues_boss_intro_text: So you made it this far. I'm almost impressed.
dialogues_boss_player_wins_text: Fine. Fine. I didn't expect that. But I had a bad morning, so it doesn't count.
dialogues_boss_taunt_text: Are you sure you're ready? Because I'm getting the opposite impression.
dialogues_boss_tired_text: You know, I'm tired of underestimating you. I'll try overestimating you and see if that helps.
dialogues_choice_chain_a_text: You picked A. Sensible. Or not — depends on context I don't have.
dialogues_hub_entry_after_death_text: Back at the desk. The dream did not keep us, but the computer is still awake if we want another try.
dialogues_hub_entry_after_final_boss_tex: The office is still here. So is the screen. If the dream has another answer, it starts at that computer.
dialogues_hub_entry_new_game_text: The office is quiet. The computer looks like it is waiting for me to choose how deep this gets.
dialogues_intro_office_monologue_02_text: Я сижу здесь который год. И ни разу не задавала себе вопрос — почему.
dialogues_intro_office_monologue_text: Ещё один понедельник. Стул, монитор, кулер.
dialogues_long_test_line_text: This is a long line made specifically to test the typewriter effect and skipping. The letters crawl slowly, you click, and everything appears at once. Then the second click closes it. If you're reading the whole thing without clicking, auto-advance works. Good.
dialogues_merchant_brush_off_text: Got it. Come back if you change your mind. Or if you die again — I'm nearby.
dialogues_merchant_goods_text: Lots of things. Some of them even work. Pick something, don't be shy.
dialogues_merchant_greet_text: Ah, a customer. Alive, apparently. How can I help?
dialogues_merchant_late_run_text: Not your first visit anymore. I respect the persistence. Still not giving a discount.
dialogues_merchant_sold_out_text: I could say 'sold out,' but honestly, nothing worthwhile arrived.
dialogues_respawn_choice_text: You died. Again. Are you learning anything from this?
dialogues_respawn_existential_text: Have you ever wondered why you keep going? No, seriously. I want to understand.
dialogues_respawn_rival_jab_text: Oh, it's you again. I thought it was over. My mistake.
dialogues_respawn_third_text: Fine, I'm impressed. Not by your success — by your persistence.
dialogues_upgrade_big_choice_text: Good choice. Or a bad one. You'll find out in two waves.
dialogues_upgrade_offered_comment_text: A choice that means something. Rare.
dialogues_wave_first_text: First wave. A warm-up. Or not — they're already serious.
ending_bad_final_version_final_ascended_: To return to the beginning is to finally see it from above.
ending_bad_final_version_final_burnout_t: Back to the beginning. Amazing. Even my nightmare uses recurring tasks.
ending_bad_final_version_final_chimera_t: Back to the beginning... what if I turned the wrong way last time?
ending_bad_final_version_final_tranquili: Back to the beginning — like a path to a home not yet built.
ending_bad_final_version_heroine_burnout: To the department where no one can find me.
ending_bad_final_version_heroine_chimera: Somewhere. I'd clarify, but I'm not answering myself.
ending_bad_final_version_heroine_tranqui: Where grass asks for no explanations.
ending_bad_final_version_monologue_burno: Who are we when everything unnecessary has finally fallen away?
ending_bad_final_version_monologue_chime: Who are we? Employees? A bug? A burning browser tab?
ending_bad_final_version_monologue_tranq: Who are we? Wait, I haven't chosen a face to answer with.
ending_bad_final_version_opening_burnout: From the office. Unfortunately, that is not a joke.
ending_bad_final_version_opening_tranqui: From the silence I postponed for too long.
ending_self_lavender_raf_final_ascended_: I don't have to prove to a tree that it has grown.
ending_self_lavender_raf_final_burnout_t: I have. And every time someone tries to turn it into a meeting.
ending_self_lavender_raf_final_chimera_t: I have. But I'm still not sure if I'm the ship, the planks, or an awkward passenger.
ending_self_lavender_raf_final_tranquili: I have. In the forest, they call it growth.
ending_self_lavender_raf_heroine_ascende: I have. Now it feels less like a paradox and more like a prayer.
ending_self_lavender_raf_heroine_burnout: I didn't change. I was reallocated without consent.
ending_self_lavender_raf_heroine_chimera: Did I change? Possibly. Or I just version-controlled myself badly.
ending_self_lavender_raf_heroine_text: I have, but you're mixing things up.
ending_self_lavender_raf_heroine_tranqui: I changed the way water changes: without a report, but by necessity.
ending_self_lavender_raf_monologue: I haven't changed, so your meta-reference is misplaced.
ending_self_lavender_raf_monologue_ascen: I changed not to disappear, but to hold more light.
ending_self_lavender_raf_monologue_burno: That's it. And of course, nobody closed the task.
ending_self_lavender_raf_monologue_chime: That's it? Should I nod confidently, or may I remain slightly unsure?
ending_self_lavender_raf_monologue_tranq: That's it. We can finally speak in whispers.
ending_self_lavender_raf_opening_ascende: That's it. Not an ending — an opening in the clouds.
ending_self_lavender_raf_opening_burnout: That's it. Time to turn off email, my head, and anything that beeps.
ending_self_lavender_raf_opening_chimera: That's it. I think. Though the word 'it' looks too confident again.
ending_self_lavender_raf_opening_text: That's it. Have you heard of the Ship of Theseus paradox?
ending_self_lavender_raf_opening_tranqui: That's it. Ahead: a path, silence, and no one in a hurry.
fire_slime_desc: A fire slime. Spits magma and ignites enemies in melee.
fire_slime_firey_touch_desc: The slime touches an enemy with its burning body. Deals $damage$ melee damage and burns for $burning_damage$ damage over {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
fire_slime_firey_touch_tooltip: Deals $damage$ damage to an adjacent target and burns it.
fire_slime_magma_spit_desc: The fire slime spits magma onto the chosen hex. Deals $damage$ damage in radius $radius$ at range $range$ and burns for $burning_damage$ damage over {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
fire_slime_magma_spit_tooltip: Deals $damage$ damage in radius $radius$ and slows enemies.
fire_world_enter_ascended_text_01: The flame rose not as a threat, but as revelation: everything unnecessary became light here.
fire_world_enter_ascended_text_02: The heat did not argue with her. It only showed that purification can also hurt.
fire_world_enter_ascended_text_03: And the world in flames suddenly looked like stained glass with heaven looking through it.
fire_world_enter_burnout_text_01: Welcome to the department of 'urgent, yesterday, and unfunded.' The temperature matches the vibe.
fire_world_enter_burnout_text_02: Deadlines, emails, faces, and patience burned here. Especially patience.
fire_world_enter_burnout_text_03: The fire worked weekends. Someone clearly gave it KPIs.
fire_world_enter_chimera_text_01: The fire was either inviting her in or warning her off. Fire is hard to read.
fire_world_enter_chimera_text_02: Everything around her melted, uncomfortably familiar: plans, roles, confidence.
fire_world_enter_chimera_text_03: The heat changed the world's shape faster than she could decide which shape to keep.
fire_world_enter_heroine_ascended_text_0: If this is judgment, I accept the sentence. But I reserve the right to glow imperfectly.
Fire is not an enemy. Fire is simply more honest than most people.
Fine. Let everything burn that cannot become light.
fire_world_enter_heroine_burnout_text_01: Oh great. A place where even the air yells at me without approval.
fire_world_enter_heroine_burnout_text_02: If anyone says 'healthy stress,' I am throwing them into lava. Politely. Twice.
fire_world_enter_heroine_burnout_text_03: I already burned out at work. Could we not turn it into an attraction here?
fire_world_enter_heroine_chimera_text_01: I feel like I've been here before. Or maybe it's any room where people expect things from me.
fire_world_enter_heroine_chimera_text_02: Okay, fire. Are you against me, with me, or also unsure where to go?
fire_world_enter_heroine_chimera_text_03: I'm not sure I'm ready to melt. Though honestly, I wasn't ready this morning either.
fire_world_enter_heroine_text_01: Do I get a shotgun? Or am I charging in with a mug again?
fire_world_enter_heroine_text_02: And that's why you couldn't invent any dimension except the floor. Another metaphor?
fire_world_enter_heroine_text_03: Did you put this metaphor about my burnout in here?
fire_world_enter_heroine_tranquility_tex: Can I just sit at the edge and listen to everything unnecessary crackle?
The heat is loud, but at least it asks nothing.
If this is burnout, I choose the place where grass grows after the fire.
fire_world_enter_text_01: Here we are, down below. Make yourself comfortable. Seen the new Avatar trailer, by the way?
fire_world_enter_text_02: I know for certain: the floor is lava. And everyone who swam in it came out stronger.
fire_world_enter_text_03: The flame greeted her not as a guest, but as an old acquaintance it had long forgotten.
fire_world_enter_tranquility_text_01: Here, fire called every shadow by name, and not one argued.
fire_world_enter_tranquility_text_02: Ash settled on the ground quietly, like a letter that no longer needed sending.
fire_world_enter_tranquility_text_03: The flame demanded no answer. It only waited for her to stop running from her own light.
fire_world_first_wave_heroine_ascended_t: She stepped forward, and the fire objected: another employee with no onboarding.
The lava moved like it had also received last-minute changes.
Somewhere in the heat, reality creaked. Apparently, nobody closed the old task again.
fire_world_first_wave_heroine_burnout_te: The flame flickered in different colors, and every color offered her another self.
The world seemed to melt sideways, leaving too many options.
The heat trembled awkwardly around her, unsure whether to attack or apologize.
fire_world_first_wave_heroine_chimera_te: Fire has a rhythm. If you breathe slowly, it almost sounds like the sea.
The flame parted reluctantly, but without malice — like tall grass.
She entered the heat like an old bathhouse: carefully, silently, without extra thoughts.
fire_world_first_wave_heroine_text_01: I'm filing a complaint! HR has to be around here somewhere.
fire_world_first_wave_heroine_text_02: Just like my face right now...
fire_world_first_wave_heroine_tranquilit: Let them come. Light does not choose whom to illuminate.
If this is a trial, I will pass through it without hatred. Well, almost without hatred.
Every strike is another way to learn what in me has not burned.
fire_world_first_wave_intro_ascended_tex: There they are. Of course. Can't even get five quiet seconds in hell.
Wonderful. More creatures that urgently need my attention.
If you're here for work too, I am officially unavailable.
fire_world_first_wave_intro_burnout_text: I don't know which one of us is in charge right now. At least they look more confident.
They are coming toward me. Or am I toward them? Why are crises so bad at directions?
Fine. I can be brave. Or at least look like bravery from a distance.
fire_world_first_wave_intro_chimera_text: If I don't make noise inside, the outside becomes simpler.
Every step is a stone across a stream. Not fast. Enough.
I don't have to win beautifully. Remaining whole is enough.
fire_world_first_wave_intro_text_02: The flame stretched, crackled, and pretended this was normal.
fire_world_first_wave_intro_text_03: Here it is. A hot scene. Just like our writer wanted.
fire_world_first_wave_intro_tranquility_: The first wave rose from the heat like a prayer that forgot whom it addressed.
They did not come to destroy her, but to test how much light a wound can hold.
And the flame took a step toward her. Not cruel. Just inevitable.
fire_world_last_wave_heroine_ascended_te: The first wave arrived without an email, without a call, and of course without context.
They looked like tasks someone marked 'quick' before running away.
The heat delivered new problems. What a rare, impossible situation.
fire_world_last_wave_heroine_burnout_tex: The first wave appeared far too confidently for creatures made of doubt.
They shimmered at the edge of sight like answer choices in a test nobody explained.
The fire shaped enemies, then seemed to doubt the composition itself.
fire_world_last_wave_heroine_chimera_tex: The first silhouettes came out of the flame quietly, almost respectfully.
The heat rustled like dry grass. There were already footsteps in that rustle.
They appeared not as enemies, but as part of a path that still had to be walked.
fire_world_last_wave_heroine_text_01: Hell will freeze over before... okay, that doesn't work here.
fire_world_last_wave_heroine_text_02: Accompanied by burned-out bodies. Yes, yes, fire metaphor, I get it.
fire_world_last_wave_heroine_tranquility: I see where the fire leads. I walk anyway.
Even if everything burns, a witness remains. Let it be me.
The last wave. How strange — I am almost grateful to it.
fire_world_last_wave_intro_ascended_text: Last wave. Great. After this I want a dark room and no one in map range.
Now everything will ask me to be efficient again. I will answer with fire.
I am so tired that 'final push' sounds like an insult.
fire_world_last_wave_intro_burnout_text_: Last one? Definitely last? I need all my versions emotionally prepared.
If I fall apart now, is that tactics or confession?
I am almost sure I can. Almost is all I have.
fire_world_last_wave_intro_chimera_text_: A little longer. Then I can listen to silence without explaining myself.
The fire is tired too. I can hear it asking to become ash.
One last circle of heat. After that, air, if it waits for us.
fire_world_last_wave_intro_text_01: Aren't you hot? I can turn on the air conditioner.
fire_world_last_wave_intro_text_02: Flames flooded everything around, as if hundreds of deadlines were feeding them again and again...
fire_world_last_wave_intro_text_03: Everything that had piled up, burned, and endured took a step forward.
fire_world_last_wave_intro_tranquility_t: The last wave rose like a wing: not to strike, but to ascend.
The flame gathered into a choir, and every voice knew her name.
Before the end, the fire became clear. Even pain sometimes wants to be understood.
fire_world_last_wave_victory_ascended_te: The last wave looked like a deadline that learned to walk.
The heat thickened like a message from management: brief, pointless, urgent.
Everything demanded one final effort. I hate when metaphors speak HR.
fire_world_last_wave_victory_burnout_tex: The last wave entered out of step, as if every part changed its mind on the way.
The fire assembled a threat from mismatched pieces. It looked too much like her.
Before the end, the world became especially uncertain, as if afraid to choose a shape.
fire_world_last_wave_victory_chimera_tex: The flame approached gently. Even a fire can tire of being loud.
The final heat did not scream. It breathed like an animal that also needed rest.
The ground underfoot was warm, but no longer foreign.
fire_world_last_wave_victory_text_01: I hate to disappoint you. This isn't real hell. Hell is other... assets.
fire_world_last_wave_victory_text_02: The fire retreated, but it didn't go out. It always comes back for the hottest deadlines.
fire_world_last_wave_victory_text_03: A road appeared ahead, leading back to where everything seemed to have begun.
fire_world_last_wave_victory_tranquility: The fire receded, leaving light that demanded no sacrifice.
The ash rose upward, as if remembering it could also be sky.
And where everything had burned, it became quiet. Not empty — holy.
forest_enter_heroine_text_02: All I have is hot coffee... Wait, wrong game.
forest_enter_heroine_text_03: All right, forest. Let's make this quick: are you a metaphor, a hallucination, or a crime scene today?
forest_first_wave_heroine_intro01_text_0: What am I supposed to roll?
forest_first_wave_heroine_intro02_text_0: Okay, forest. I get it. You're not just background, you're a metaphor for a toxic environment.
forest_first_wave_heroine_intro03_text_0: If this is my inner world, I want to speak to the level designer.
Oh, great! Forest metaphors are about to turn my personal crisis into a mechanic.
forest_first_wave_intro01_text_01: We'll drop you in the jungle for a while, until a five or an eight finally turns up here.
forest_first_wave_intro02_text_01: The leaves rustled, the branches shivered. The locals clearly know nothing about personal space...
forest_first_wave_intro03_text_01: Somewhere behind the bushes, an enemy spawn animation appeared. Narratively speaking, this was called “nature woke up.”
forest_last_wave_heroine_ascended_text_0: The fire ended. Unfortunately, my irritation is a renewable resource.
The flames withdrew, and I still want to write someone a very sharp email.
Victory. Now can we please cancel all future fires?
forest_last_wave_heroine_burnout_text_01: I think we made it. Or one version of me did, and the rest are applauding.
forest_last_wave_heroine_burnout_text_02: The fire went out, and I could see how much I had mistaken for myself.
forest_last_wave_heroine_burnout_text_03: I thought fire would leave an answer. It left even more space.
forest_last_wave_heroine_chimera_text_01: After fire, the air smells of soil. That is enough to continue.
forest_last_wave_heroine_chimera_text_02: The ash settled quietly. It doesn't need to be touched right away.
forest_last_wave_heroine_chimera_text_03: If something burned, let it become soil.
forest_last_wave_heroine_text_01: I feel like the forest is about to try closing the gestalt one last time.
forest_last_wave_heroine_text_02: Come on, forest. Show me what you wanted to turn me into.
forest_last_wave_heroine_text_03: Phew, lucky my greatest enemy isn't here right now — allergies.
forest_last_wave_heroine_tranquility_tex: And the forest raised its branches like hands: not surrendering, but blessing.
The green silence returned to its place, and even the wounds in it looked like leaves.
She left the forest not taller, but brighter.
forest_last_wave_victory_ascended_text_0: The forest is over. Please don't turn this into a nature team-building exercise.
The trees survived, I survived, and my patience is officially written off.
Victory over the forest. Great. Now to defeat everyone who says 'just rest.'
forest_last_wave_victory_burnout_text_01: The forest let me go. Or I let the forest go. Or we awkwardly parted ways.
forest_last_wave_victory_burnout_text_02: I think I won. Though the forest looks like it simply chose not to argue.
forest_last_wave_victory_burnout_text_03: I came out different. Or the same, but with leaves in my head. Also valid.
forest_last_wave_victory_chimera_text_01: The trees remained. So did I. No one defeated anyone, and that is good.
forest_last_wave_victory_chimera_text_02: The forest became a forest again, not an assignment.
forest_last_wave_victory_chimera_text_03: In the silence after the fight, you could hear the world mending itself.
forest_last_wave_victory_text_01: And then silence fell. What a pity! Because the trees... in the forest... were gone!
forest_last_wave_victory_text_02: The trees are still here... Where are you even watching from?! And who are you anyway?!
forest_last_wave_victory_text_03: The light recognized her and asked for no password.
forest_last_wave_victory_tranquility_tex: The sky opened so wide that forgiveness seemed its usual weather.
Heaven. Great. Another open-plan office, now with eyes.
Someone raised the ceiling too high. I did not approve this redesign.
hallo_desc: A loud greeting that makes the bear noticeably bolder. Strength $n_attack_buff$ for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
heaven_enter_ascended_text: Is this heaven? Or did I assemble the religious symbolism wrong?
heaven_enter_burnout_text: Beautiful. Terrifying. I feel like I should behave better, but how exactly?
heaven_enter_chimera_text: The sky does not press down. It waits for me to stop defending myself from air.
heaven_enter_heroine_ascended_text: There is too much light here. At least it asks nothing.
heaven_enter_heroine_burnout_text: If this is heaven, I accept the invitation. Though my shoes may violate the dress code.
heaven_enter_heroine_chimera_text: I am not holy. But perhaps holiness is not the absence of cracks.
heaven_enter_heroine_tranquility_text: If one more eye looks at me evaluatively, I am going to hell on principle.
heaven_enter_tranquility_text: Is heavenly QA already here? I don't have the energy for a soul audit.
heaven_first_wave_heroine_ascended_text: They are looking at me. Or through me. Either way, uncomfortable.
heaven_first_wave_heroine_burnout_text: I'm not sure whether to pray, wave, or apologize for my appearance.
heaven_first_wave_heroine_chimera_text: A sea of light. If you swim slowly, you don't have to drown.
heaven_first_wave_heroine_text: Or they'll christen me a loser girl? We'll see about that!
heaven_first_wave_heroine_tranquility_te: I will speak more softly. Perhaps then the sky will answer softly too.
heaven_first_wave_intro_ascended_text: The angelic choir sounded like silence finally given a voice.
heaven_first_wave_intro_burnout_text: Every eye was not a verdict, but a window.
heaven_first_wave_intro_chimera_text: Heaven offered her battle so gently it almost felt like a blessing.
heaven_first_wave_intro_text: All they talk about here is the sea. I hope you can keep the conversation going.
heaven_first_wave_intro_tranquility_text: The angels arrived out of queue, like tasks from people who write 'just a minute.'
heaven_last_wave_heroine_ascended_text_0: The light blinked. Apparently even heaven can send surprise deadlines.
Too many wings, too little respect for personal space.
The first angel appeared confidently. I would too, if I had instructions.
heaven_last_wave_heroine_burnout_text_01: They look correct. That is especially frightening.
heaven_last_wave_heroine_burnout_text_02: I don't know what heaven wants from me, but I hope there's a hint.
heaven_last_wave_heroine_burnout_text_03: The light approached, but did not hurry me. It was almost kindness.
heaven_last_wave_heroine_chimera_text_01: Even angels are loud if you listen with fear.
heaven_last_wave_heroine_chimera_text_02: Let them come. I will meet them like rain: with open hands.
heaven_last_wave_heroine_chimera_text_03: I see their light and do not look away.
heaven_last_wave_heroine_text_01: I'd like to note the biblical accuracy of these angels. 5440 pixels of biblical accuracy.
heaven_last_wave_heroine_text_03: An eye for an eye... As long as it isn't mine, right?
heaven_last_wave_heroine_tranquility_tex: If this is judgment, let it be merciful. If it is battle, let it be clear.
Final heavenly review. Great. I am exactly not ready for feedback.
If they say 'we see your potential,' I will start screaming.
heaven_last_wave_victory_ascended_text_0: Last wave of angels. Who has the unsubscribe button?
Last angels. Probably. Or is this just the first revision of the final version?
I almost understand them. Or almost understand myself. Awkward distinction.
heaven_last_wave_victory_burnout_text_01: If the light accepts me, which me does it mean?
heaven_last_wave_victory_burnout_text_02: Heaven came close like a tree crown above my face.
heaven_last_wave_victory_burnout_text_03: I don't have to rise higher. I can just lie down and look.
heaven_last_wave_victory_chimera_text_01: The last wave of light. After it, only breath.
heaven_last_wave_victory_chimera_text_02: When the angels closed the circle, she finally understood: a circle is not always a cage.
heaven_last_wave_victory_chimera_text_03: The final light descended gently, like a hand on a shoulder.
heaven_last_wave_victory_text_01: Am I opening the highway to hell now?
heaven_last_wave_victory_text_02: And suddenly a crack appeared in the ground... As safe as the last commit.
heaven_last_wave_victory_text_03: And holiness left this place. And hundreds of eyes witnessed it.
heaven_last_wave_victory_tranquility_tex: And hundreds of eyes watched not to judge, but to witness.
Heaven frowned. Apparently I don't match the salvation brandbook.
The angels came in one final batch. Classic: everything urgent arrives at the end of the day.
honey_cold_desc: Healing honey with a chilling side effect. Heals $heal$ at range $range$ and slows for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
lavender_lion_bite_desc: The lion bites an enemy and recovers from the successful bite. Deals $damage$ melee damage and heals self for $heal$. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
lavender_lion_bite_tooltip: Deals $damage$ damage to an adjacent target and heals self for $heal$.
lavender_lion_desc: A dangerous lavender lion. Bites, scares enemies, and buffs allies with a roar.
lavender_lion_roar_desc: The lavender lion lets out a mighty roar, inspiring everyone nearby. Grants $n_attack_buff$ Strength for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
lavender_lion_roar_tooltip: Increases the attack of nearby allies.
lavender_lion_scare_desc: The lion frightens enemies with a lavender roar and breaks their focus. Fears enemies in radius $radius$ at range $range$ for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
lavender_lion_scare_tooltip: Frightens enemies in a small area.
manekin_desc: A training target with no emotions and questionable patience.
monkey_business_desc: The monkey gets up to monkey business and strikes a nearby enemy. Deals $damage$ melee damage. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
monkey_business_tooltip: Deals $damage$ damage to an adjacent target.
monkey_desc: An office monkey. Hits fast and buffs itself before a fight.
monkey_time_desc: The monkey enters monkey time and gets ready to fight. Gains $n_attack_buff$ Strength and $n_block$ shield for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
monkey_time_tooltip: Buffs itself and gains a small shield.
mushroom_boar_desc: A mushroom boar that gores with tusks and disrupts enemies with spores.
mushroom_boar_spores_desc: The mushroom boar releases a cloud of spores around the chosen hex. Stuns enemies in radius $radius$ at range $range$ for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
mushroom_boar_tusk_attack_desc: The mushroom boar strikes sharply with its tusks. Deals $damage$ melee damage. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
mushroom_boar_tusk_attack_tooltip: Deals $damage$ damage to an adjacent target.
mushroom_boar_weaken_desc: The mushroom boar infects the target with spores, temporarily reducing its strength. Applies $n_attack_debuff$ Weakness at range $range$ for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
nice_smell_desc: An overly pleasant scent pulls everyone closer to the source. Pulls targets in radius $radius$. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
office_final_enter_ascended: The light demanded one final effort. I now hate this light on corporate grounds.
office_final_enter_burnout: The final light broke into too many meanings. I didn't sign up to pick one.
office_final_enter_chimera: The angels seemed to wait for an answer, and I was still looking for my own voice.
office_final_enter_heroine_ascended: The sky was clear, and I still got lost in it.
office_final_enter_heroine_burnout: Even in heaven there is wind. It does not ask who you were yesterday.
office_final_enter_heroine_chimera: The light settled on my shoulders lightly, like pollen.
office_final_enter_heroine_tranquility: The last angels were like clouds: frightening until they pass by.
office_final_enter_tranquility: The light remained, but stopped being pain.
office_final_pre_boss_ascended_text_01: The eyes closed not from shame, but from peace.
office_final_pre_boss_ascended_text_02: And heaven became not higher, but closer.
office_final_pre_boss_ascended_text_03: Heaven cleared. Check the box, close the task, don't invite me to retro.
office_final_pre_boss_burnout_text_01: The light withdrew. I am still annoyed, but now at least beautifully lit.
office_final_pre_boss_burnout_text_02: The angels left. Hopefully without a follow-up email.
office_final_pre_boss_burnout_text_03: I don't think the light fixed me. It just showed how many of me there are.
office_final_pre_boss_chimera_text_01: Heaven let me go. Or I fell out of it. The difference is blurry.
office_final_pre_boss_chimera_text_02: The eyes closed, and I still felt seen.
office_final_pre_boss_chimera_text_03: After light, leaves are easier to hear.
office_final_pre_boss_text_01: We've been through quite a lot together... will you tell me who you are?
office_final_pre_boss_text_02: Your metamorphoses... are like splinters to me!
office_final_pre_boss_text_03: The bear sat down in the office and burned. Very funny.
office_final_pre_boss_tranquility_text_0: Heaven became quiet, like water cupped in hands.
I didn't take the light with me. I simply stopped hiding from it.
paper_jam_desc: A classic office nightmare: paper jams everything nearby. Roots enemies in radius $radius$ at range $range$ for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
paper_jam_tooltip: Rooted for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns} in radius $radius$ (hex within $range$). Cooldown: $cooldown$.
passive_bloodletting_desc: Heals you for $amount$% of damage dealt by any damaging skill.
passive_bloodletting_tooltip: Lifesteal: $amount$% of dealt damage is converted to healing.
passive_cellular_regen_desc: Restores $amount$ HP at the start of each turn.
passive_chilling_aura_desc: Applies slow to adjacent enemies for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns} each turn.
passive_chilling_aura_tooltip: Slows adjacent enemies for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns} each turn.
passive_chitin_guard_desc: Blocks $amount$ damage from every incoming hit.
passive_cruel_focus_desc: Adds $amount$ damage to all damaging skills.
passive_extra_choice_desc: Adds $amount$ extra card to each post-wave skill offer.
passive_intimidating_aura_desc: Applies fear to adjacent enemies for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns} each turn.
passive_intimidating_aura_tooltip: Fears adjacent enemies for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns} each turn.
passive_long_reach_desc: Increases the target range of all skills by $amount$ hex.
passive_persistent_venom_desc: Increases status durations from your skills by {$amount$;turn;turns;turns}.
passive_quick_synapses_desc: Reduces cooldowns of all skills by $amount$, to a minimum of 0.
passive_ranged_shove_desc: Damaging ranged skills push enemies back by $amount$ hex.
passive_ranged_shove_tooltip: Ranged damaging skills push enemies $amount$ hex.
passive_static_discharge_desc: Deals $amount$ damage to adjacent enemies at the start of each turn.
passive_static_discharge_tooltip: Deals $amount$ damage to adjacent enemies each turn.
passive_swift_steps_desc: Increases movement speed by $amount$ hex per turn.
passive_thorned_echo_desc: Reflects $amount$% of received damage back to the attacker.
passive_thorned_echo_tooltip: Reflects $amount$% incoming damage to the attacker.
passive_wide_pulse_desc: Increases radius of all area skills by $amount$.
paw_suck_desc: A short pause to soothe the paw and get back into the fight. Heals self for $heal$. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
skill_offer.pool.basic.name: Basic skills
skill_offer.replace.hover_hint: Hover a slot to preview what gets replaced.
skill_offer.replace.prompt: Pick a slot to replace with %s
skill_test_combo_multikey_effect_desc: Test ability for checking multiple effects at once.
skill_test_combo_multikey_effect_tooltip: Test: multiple effects on one target.
skill_test_status_fear_desc: Test ability for checking the fear status.
skill_test_status_fear_tooltip: Applies fear in a test scenario.
skill_test_status_multi_desc: Test ability for checking multiple statuses.
skill_test_status_rage_tooltip: Applies rage in a test scenario.
skill_test_status_runtime_desc: Test ability for checking statuses during combat.
skill_test_status_runtime_tooltip: Creates a runtime status for testing.
spores_desc: A cloud of spores dazes enemies and steals their turn. Stuns enemies in radius $radius$ at range $range$ for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
spores_tooltip: Stunned for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns} in radius $radius$ (hex within $range$). Cooldown: $cooldown$.
staple_shot_desc: A staple flies straight, hurts, and slows the target. Deals $damage$ damage at range $range$ and slows for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
stapler_desc: A living stapler. Shoots staples, jams paper, and jumps around the office.
stapler_paper_jam_desc: The stapler creates a paper jam that blocks movement. Roots enemies in radius $radius$ at range $range$ for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
stapler_paper_jam_tooltip: Roots enemies in radius $radius$ for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
stapler_staple_shot_desc: The stapler fires a staple, hurting and slowing the enemy. Deals $damage$ damage at range $range$ and slows for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
stapler_staple_shot_tooltip: Deals $damage$ ranged damage and slows the target.
stapler_under_desk_jump_desc: The stapler suddenly jumps under the desk and changes position. Teleports to a safer place. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
stapler_under_desk_jump_tooltip: Teleports to a safer place. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
status.summoned.name: Name
status_enraged_desc: Deals more damage and acts more aggressively.
status_feared_desc: Frightened and may lose control of actions.
status_glitched_desc: Behaves unpredictably because of a glitch.
sting_desc: A quick jab with a poisonous aftertaste. Deals $damage$ damage and poisons for $poisoned_damage_pct$% max HP over {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
sting_tooltip: $damage$ damage, Poisoned: $poisoned_damage_pct$% max HP for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}, 2% chance (target within $range$). Cooldown: $cooldown$.
story_intro_heroine_text: Five minutes. Just five minutes, and I'll be... I'll be...
story_intro_opening_text: She sat between a mug, a monitor, and a deadline. The three things adults are usually assembled from.
summon_bee_desc: Calls another bee to help the hive. Creates a bee on a hex within range $range$. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
summon_bee_tooltip: Creates a bee on a hex within $range$. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
teapot_desc: A living teapot. Manipulates the battlefield, lava, and strange probabilities.
teapot_low_possibility_desc: The teapot vanishes by taking advantage of a very low probability. Turns invisible. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
teapot_spill_the_t_desc: The teapot spills the truth, making the ground dangerous. Creates a lava pool on a hex within range $range$. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
teapot_spill_the_t_tooltip: Creates a lava pool on the chosen hex.
teapot_tea_gathering_desc: The teapot gathers everyone for tea, pulling targets toward the center. Pulls enemies in radius $radius$ at range $range$. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
teapot_tea_gathering_tooltip: Pulls enemies in an area toward the chosen point.
tusk_attack_desc: The mushroom boar rams the nearest target with its tusks. Deals $damage$ damage at range $range$. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
ui_dialogue_validate_absolute_turn_event: trigger '%s': absolute_turn only applies to world_turn_ended event
ui_dialogue_validate_cleared_turns_event: trigger '%s': cleared_in_turns_lt only applies to wave_cleared event
ui_dialogue_validate_event_empty: trigger '%s': event must not be empty
ui_dialogue_validate_id_empty: trigger id must not be empty
ui_floor_replace_none: Nothing to replace — no other types
ui_game_editor_exit_unsaved_body: Exit Game Editor and lose unsaved changes?
ui_game_editor_help_label_text: Compose levels in order. Each level is a map from data/maps/. Mark exactly one as Intro (cutscene fires before it). Save as .game.json.
ui_game_editor_level_row_edit_button_too: Open this level's map in the Map Editor (saves the game first).
ui_game_editor_load_unsaved_body: You have unsaved changes. Load another game and lose them?
ui_game_editor_restore_body: An autosave from a previous Game Editor session was found. Restore it?
ui_game_validate_intro_duplicate: level %d had is_intro=true (already set on earlier level); cleared
ui_godmode_help_label_text: RMB=move (1 step)  SPACE=wait  QWER/1234=select  LMB=cast  F1=spawn dummy  F2=clear
ui_hub_computer_body: The dream is ready. Dive in or stay in the office.
ui_level_editor_autosave_restore_body: Found unsaved work from %s minutes ago. Restore?
ui_level_editor_multi_wave_warning: Multi-wave map (%s waves) loaded. Editing affects wave 0 only — full wave editor in 061.
ui_main_menu_run_mode_body: Choose a tutorial or one of the available campaigns.
ui_main_menu_run_mode_story_body: Start in the office hub, keep collected skills, and dive into the dream when ready.
ui_main_menu_run_mode_title: How do you want to start?
ui_main_menu_run_mode_tutorial_body: A short guided map for learning movement, turns, and skills.
ui_resolver_smoke_help_text:
019 tile-object-resolver smoke
------------------------------
F5 this scene. Check Output panel for PASS / FAIL.
No TileMap needed - pure logic test with stub grid + real JSON registries.

Scenarios: A=on_enter  B=on_turn_end  C=linger(2turns)  D=aura_heal  E=breakable+on_destroy
ui_settings_panel_keybinds_body_text:
QWER / 1234 - cast slots
SPACE - wait
LMB - cast at hex
RMB - move (1 step)
ESC - cancel cast / pause
L - toggle combat log
? - keybind overlay
F1 - spawn dummy (godmode)
F2 - clear (godmode)
F5 - reload speed config
ui_spawner_palette_timer_hint: Turns until spawner triggers. 0 = immediate. Applied to newly-placed spawners.
ui_tabs_all_detached_hint: (All tabs detached — drag a detached panel back here)
ui_tile_objects_smoke_help_text:
018 tile-objects smoke
-------------------------
Console output (Output panel) shows:
  - All 6 tile objects loaded with their fields
  - burning tile_effect verified (duration=2)
  - F1-F4 emit and log the 4 EventBus signals

Full in-arena smoke (lava walk, barrel break, fountain aura) requires
the TileSet 'object_id' custom data layer (T005a, manual in editor).
ui_trigger_dialogue_help_tooltip: Dialogue ID — what plays when the trigger fires. Distinct from trigger id above.
ui_trigger_id_help_tooltip: Unique trigger ID — used in logs and once-tracking. Not the dialogue.
ui_tutorial_complete_body: You moved, picked targets, attacked, dodged danger, and gained a skill. The loop is simple: read the field, choose a safe action, end the turn.
ui_tutorial_complete_footer: Click or press Space to continue.
ui_tutorial_far_body: First, move closer: right-click a highlighted hex. Check skill range by its highlights: select a slot or hover it.
ui_tutorial_final_body: Repeat the loop: W at medium range, Q next to an enemy, and E or another self effect when HP drops.
ui_tutorial_footer_default: Keep playing: hints do not block your turn.
ui_tutorial_heal_body: Your HP dropped. Press E/3 and click yourself: green skills usually heal or protect.
ui_tutorial_melee_body: The enemy is next to you. Press Q/1, then left-click the highlighted target. Melee skills hit adjacent hexes.
ui_tutorial_melee_cooldown_body: Melee skills are on cooldown. The slot number shows turns left. Take a safe position while you wait.
ui_tutorial_move_body: Right-click the glowing hex. The bright outline shows where you can move. Red arrows show where enemies will move on their turn.
ui_tutorial_ranged_body: The enemy is far away, but W can reach it. Press W/2: targets light up, then left-click the enemy.
ui_tutorial_ranged_cooldown_body: Ranged skills are on cooldown. The slot number shows turns left. Move to a safe hex for your next attack.
ui_tutorial_skill_offer_body: After a wave, you can take a card: a new active skill, a passive skill, or an upgrade. Read it and pick what helps. If you do not want one, skip when allowed.
ui_tutorial_threat_body: Red hexes and icons show the next enemy attack. You are in danger: right-click a highlighted safe hex.
ui_tutorial_wait_body: An enemy can start as a spawn marker. If no target is ready, press Space; the glowing hex shows where it appears.
ui_tutorial_wave_clear_body: No enemies or spawn markers are left. If a skill choice or new wave is opening, let the transition finish.
ui_wavesettings_music_config_hint: Raw JSON object overriding level music_config for this wave. Empty = fallback.
ui_wavesettings_wave_triggers_hint: Read-only mirror — edit in the Level section above.
under_desk_jump_desc: A sharp jump into the safe zone under the desk. Teleports under the desk and gains a shield. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
weaken_desc: Mold finds weak points and cuts the target's fighting spirit. Applies $n_attack_debuff$ Weakness at range $range$ for {$duration$;turn;turns;turns}. Cooldown: $cooldown$.
